textByHash.0000efc0baafd8ec385f4d8a799327eb4adb9cd1: Impressive JalYt, but why do you show me this?
textByHash.0a5153b64343298ad1d345f8cee3ce72636b696c: When TzHaar hatch, some memories are lost. Those about earliest ancestors are not retained. We experiment.
textByHash.0b2ab251e96865caed63ea28f42fd2872748e315: The creatures down there are dangerous. If you can kill some of them, it would be very helpful to TzHaar.
textByHash.0c279077e5a699a1b5bc6c00ba81f0ac997feed5: Please accept this cape as a token of appreciation.
textByHash.10d43f1b2f4257f51d5e1aa8429dfdf32b7b6fae: If you sacrifice your fire cape to me, I can take your word.
textByHash.11c10fcb9db85472268f30309acc64d540767d09: No! TzKal-Zuk's prison is breaking down. There's nothing I can do for you now, JalYt!
textByHash.1c1ae94ae618690e2e553bdbaac12704a602a3be: We do not know where he came from. All we know is that TzKal-Zuk is hungry. Hungry for memories, memories beyond the Inferno.
textByHash.25962621bf4edea4eb5f02fbbe40276ae205ec33: Thank you, JalYt--Xo-. You can enter Inferno now.
textByHash.25df86d9e6eb86a9701d207f68fae935ad0615b3: We think his goal is the city itself. Lots of TzHaar memories here for him. Luckily, he is trapped in prison down there, and we are keeping him at bay by offering sacrifices.
textByHash.25ec631a471ebce7f33c031168f234427ff0da1a: Yes, but you JalYt do not understand, we kept pushing it. We wanted answers, but too deep we went.
textByHash.281bd160fa2920916a2aafca0b5d13974b853950: We decide to experiment more. We take eggs from creatures in Fight Cave and incubate them down there.
textByHash.2e48f115aae58b6c2130d486f1b87e0f867a0e9f: You are very impressive for a JalYt. You managed to defeat TzKal-Zuk, for now...
textByHash.43510e0b01a566ed7baad0f86838b8e599470b2f: You can head into The Inferno anytime. We trust you to help us JalYt--Xo-.
textByHash.47cd1aa6abccde831bf2916a688c6dd3ea5de249: Eventually the pool collapsed into a sinkhole. At the bottom we found some sort of ancient incubation chamber, from before earliest memories. We now call it the Inferno.
textByHash.488eb8f5267cb242cbb267c3f360d050a2f5d045: We TzHaar have special ability. When incubated in lava, a hatched TzHaar retains knowledge and memories of ancestors who returned to the lava.
textByHash.5129b11a9a0ad01f037e8186f665189343a4f47b: I have one idea. If you sacrifice your fire cape to me, I can take your word.
textByHash.54de6f35ac5880adb3c9fcd964e2e3d0c1319cf5: I think maybe you can, but first you need to prove I can trust you.
textByHash.58c2856ddbd12b1aa06d329ea3ccb15b7f6d5cc2: Luck be a TzHaar tonight. Jal-Nib-Rek is yours.
textByHash.66f7d5867c17dc02a3ddd63b39b4afe378c04db4: Instead of knowledge, we now have a prison of dangerous creatures... and they're not under our control.
textByHash.6bb7b8c45b107afdd4ef7edf3ab26e67079ebe43: TzHaar are born from eggs incubated in lava pools. When hatched, we retain memories. Memories and knowledge passed on from ancestors who returned to the lava.
textByHash.70612ced41f036d89029e41c18309fe55c2b6908: We decide to experiment. We take eggs from creatures in Fight Cave and incubate them.
textByHash.74407a43f61e10d9b3f468b139906550e344f93c: Very well. I shall be the one to endorse your attempts to reach even greater heights.
textByHash.782caf785a6292d5f4e08cc493b4b117be330012: We fear not. But we hoped you, with your fancy JalYt weaponry, would be able to help hold back his creatures. You proved your commitment by sacrificing your fire cape.
textByHash.7c712f562ba0a8f6e5321ddb3effba6711eb66b7: We are worried about trusting JalYt to take on this task for us.
textByHash.7ef867793b0f3a49710e4809251ca11c26370424: But now you can be trusted, I must also give warning. Another being lives in the Inferno, one more powerful than any TzHaar.
textByHash.7f1f51ae8d5323bcd3fc42e8b6d88b1ab20f9f5e: Very well, just hand it over.
textByHash.7ff59e52ebb2d2ec986d0880c4ee5f4141c7176e: When eggs hatched, we see that it was not good decision. They were bigger and stronger, and fought each other for dominance.
textByHash.8104804d0cf8bceed9f95e772735f4b08cf3af07: I have one idea, if you could sacrifice your fire cape to me, I can take your word.
textByHash.8116b64274b2c6675fa115cb2743b813ab81ffbd: Eventually the pool collapsed into a sink hole, huge Inferno there. This was big ancient incubation chamber.
textByHash.8c4e0e6c7bc5b545b84bba74e76915039028ae65: We fear he can't be defeated, but maybe we can hold back his creatures and keep city safe.
textByHash.960f85939a66f1ba42ee0f6c9de9136361badd23: JalYt, we need help, but this is extremely dangerous. TzHaar not strong enough to take control back.
textByHash.97d0037b2e9e9c5f254afb05f8b3cd94d6bd9c5b: We pushed it too far! JalYt would not understand. The memories, we needed them. Now big Inferno.
textByHash.9fea3cc939e0e3bf9786bafbb95a19f38a24ebd5: Instead of knowledge, we now have chamber of dangerous creatures. It gets worse, but I don't know if I can trust JalYt--Xo- with this knowledge.
textByHash.a3a256b22411803f6023afbe31daa19d44867f8a: This here was once our largest birthing pool. We use it for experiment. We increased the depth at which eggs are incubated. Over time, newly hatched TzHaar had more memories of lost history!
textByHash.a61e26f42a3ea747789ab01af6058cfc5b509776: We went too far... way too far, we need the memories. JalYt would not understand.
textByHash.a95deb181a1ec915139f582f716793b91664a2d5: One grew incredibly strong, powerful. He controls those creatures in the prison. TzKal-Zuk, as we call him...is hungry.
textByHash.ac8aac8bd0358e761a6004d9b924da6b5f046f06: But do know, you do not get cape back.
textByHash.b0f32df1fe94bfc7a9b55b91b164a2574ada9de0: When hatched, we retain memories. Memories and knowledge passed on from ancestors who returned to the lava.
textByHash.b3204cf2ae4de6b3935b2055b05eac65aafe8feb: Instead of knowledge, we now have chamber of dangerous creatures, and they're not alone. Another being lives in the Inferno, one more powerful than any TzHaar.
textByHash.b357829c54bb02a8f49c91c8ff1cea9fa8a353d0: We hatched eggs in there and it was not a good decision. They were so different, bigger, stronger and fought each other for dominance.
textByHash.bb51b6aa2502f7ae1842b37c27d5a09c804ae975: Hmm. You ask for much, JalYt. But if anybody has proven themselves worthy it is you.
textByHash.bd7dfdfc8c6d6b150007e6594a9e5a563af05cbb: Instead of knowledge, we now have a prison of dangerous TzHaar creatures - it gets worse but I cannot trust JalYt with this knowledge yet.
textByHash.c1c956a1e92b9fc276ddcbe75a6590f4d7fe227f: Give it your best shot JalYt--Xo-.
textByHash.d6a318b192283b1fe9cb774f6a438c235a8cc2db: This is our birthing pool. TzHaar are born from eggs incubated in this large pool here.
textByHash.d83a46f8d832ef66b7db387134927bf8f330c0d7: We increased the depth at which the eggs are incubated. Over time this worked, newly hatched TzHaar had more memories of lost history!
textByHash.e19badbc3a0a384019f65461d821a65ad68272c8: You, a mere JalYt, showed us he can be stopped though. Thanks to you, we still have hope.
textByHash.e8072f4d0cd0c3336bbb429010ff9b0da4c7732f: Not all memories though, those about earliest ancestors were not being retained. We experiment.
textByHash.f04881fc93e55dd4d66119a7ae1d2ff4dbc7424c: Maybe. Hand it over and if you make lucky TokKul toss, it can be yours JalYt.
textByHash.f25d355600d0285be25f83ce91fe24c63607ddc6: But we kept pushing. We wanted answers, but we went too deep.
textByHash.f56293dcc618cd362a47dc7e48a4b3ca8d4bcd5b: Hungry for memories, memories beyond the Inferno, which only TzHaar in the city can provide.
textByHash.f90ff391c28f1086d7c3ec47438b83fda8805205: We can only guess one day he will want to scale up into the city himself. We are keeping him at bay by offering sacrifices for him to feast on.
